name: RAG Knowledge Base
description: Search and manage your workspace knowledge base — documents, Telegram history, web sources.

backendUrl.description: Backend writer API URL (default: from RAG_BACKEND_URL env var)

workspaceId.description: Workspace UUID (default: from WORKSPACE_ID env var)

internalToken.description: Internal API token for backend auth (default: from OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN env var)
